---
title: "Contacts"
description: "How to reach me — email, affiliation, research profiles"
format: html
---

<span class="eyebrow">Colophon · How to reach me</span>

<p class="lede">For research enquiries, collaborations, and academic correspondence.</p>

## Direct

- **Email** — massimo.aria\[at\]unina.it
- **Affiliation** — Department of Economics and Statistics, University of Naples Federico II
- **Address** — Via Cintia, Monte Sant'Angelo, Naples, Italy

## Research Profiles

- **ORCID** — <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8517-9411" target="_blank">0000-0002-8517-9411</a>
- **Google Scholar** — <a href="https://scholar.google.it/citations?user=Qu66YZQAAAAJ" target="_blank">Qu66YZQAAAAJ</a>
- **ResearcherID** — <a href="https://www.researcherid.com/rid/O-7983-2015" target="_blank">O-7983-2015</a>
- **ResearchGate** — <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Massimo_Aria" target="_blank">Massimo Aria</a>

## Research Institutions & Groups

- <a href="https://www.k-synth.com" target="_blank">K-Synth Academic Spin-off</a>
- <a href="https://www.bibliometrix.org" target="_blank">Bibliometrix — official website</a>
- <a href="https://www.bibliometrix.org/sssm" target="_blank">Summer School in Science Mapping</a>
- <a href="https://www.dises.unina.it" target="_blank">Department of Economics and Statistics, Federico II</a>
- <a href="https://www.unina.it" target="_blank">University of Naples Federico II</a>
